channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-16 17:55 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: The computational power in your iPhone’s CHARGER is more than what was used to land on the moon.
item.description: The computational power in your iPhone’s CHARGER is more than what was used to land on the moon.

item.title: @elonmusk: Britain's sad legal reality is that people who complain and protest about migrant crimes often get p...
item.description: Britain's sad legal reality is that people who complain and protest about migrant crimes often get punished more severely than the criminals themselves

item.title: @elonmusk: Being ranked #1 doesn’t mean we’re good enough. It only means we're more *reasonable* than others. T...
item.description: Being ranked #1 doesn’t mean we’re good enough. It only means we're more *reasonable* than others. There’s still a lot of work to do. If we’re not solving users’ problems, then we’re not good enough. If you have any feedbacks on Video Editing, feel free to leave it in the comments. Thank you!

item.title: @elonmusk: America does not have “magic ground” that fundamentally changes who people are when they arrive here...
item.description: America does not have “magic ground” that fundamentally changes who people are when they arrive here. If we filter for high work ethic, talent & trustworthiness, we will get that. If we don’t, we will inherit all the problems of the countries those people are leaving. The end.

item.title: @elonmusk: There is no substitute for the person who Knows What To Do.
item.description: There is no substitute for the person who Knows What To Do.

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink available in Central African Republic 🇨🇫
item.description: Starlink available in Central African Republic 🇨🇫

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk tells his favorite joke about economists😂
item.description: Elon Musk tells his favorite joke about economists😂

item.title: @elonmusk: United Airlines is showing a@Starlinkcommercial during the flight.
item.description: United Airlines is showing a@Starlinkcommercial during the flight.

item.title: @elonmusk: Gn, 𝕏..·˚ ༘ ☾ ⋆｡˚ ☄︎ Grok Imagine "extend from frame" 30 second continuous video.💫
item.description: Gn, 𝕏..·˚ ༘ ☾ ⋆｡˚ ☄︎ Grok Imagine "extend from frame" 30 second continuous video.💫

item.title: @elonmusk: People today forget or simply can’t believe how depraved Ehrlich really was: Demanded that the FCC r...
item.description: People today forget or simply can’t believe how depraved Ehrlich really was: Demanded that the FCC require TV shows to depict large families in a negative light, so that parents with multiple children would be shamed and ostracized by society. Proposed forcibly sterilizing millions of Americans by poisoning the water supply to make them infertile. He couldn’t think of a drug to do it “safely,” but wanted to do it anyway. Supported actual forced sterilization campaigns in India and China, where millions of people Warned that population growth would lead to starvation, but also proposed cutting off food aid to “overpopulated” countries to reduce their populations… by starvation.
